# Copilot Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the `.github` directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: static multi-page bar website with home, alcohols, and contact pages.
- [x] Scaffold the Project: created `index.html`, `alcohols.html`, `contact.html`, `styles.css`, and `script.js`.
- [x] Customize the Project: added responsive layout, branded visual style, and shared navigation.
- [x] Install Required Extensions: skipped, no extensions were provided by setup info.
- [x] Compile the Project: static files validated; no workspace errors found.
- [x] Create and Run Task: skipped, no build task required for plain static HTML/CSS/JS.
- [x] Launch the Project: pending user debug/launch confirmation (not auto-launched).
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete: `README.md` exists and this file has been cleaned of HTML comments.

- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
